response.justification: Bogdan Szabo lacks direct experience with embedded systems, Linux kernel source-code modification, or networking/SDN technologies critical for this role. His background is heavily skewed toward web/mobile development, DevOps, and high-level application programming (e.g., TypeScript, JavaScript, Node.js), with no evidence of C programming for UNIX/Linux kernel development, embedded firmware, or switch chip technologies. Additionally, he does not meet the native-level Japanese proficiency requirement.
strengths: Strong software engineering fundamentals with experience in multiple languages and paradigms (C, C++, D, TypeScript, etc.).
Proven ability to learn and adapt to new technologies quickly, as demonstrated by diverse roles and projects.
Experience with system-level programming and performance optimization in high-throughput environments.
concerns: No demonstrated experience with embedded systems, firmware development, or Linux kernel modifications.
Lacks required proficiency in C for UNIX/Linux kernel development and embedded networking.
Does not meet the native-level Japanese language requirement for the role.
